[[Churabba]] was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] with a cunning business mind who led a diplomatic mission to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]] during the [[Xim Wars]].

==Biography==
By the time of her mission, Hutt efforts in the [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]] had already recruited the [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]] and the [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodrans]] to their side in the conflict. Convincing the more technologically sophisticated [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] of Kintan to serve the Hutts was more challenging. However, Churabba realized that the [[Cult of M'dweshuu]] that ruled Kintan was feared by the Nikto people, and that the Hutts would be seen as saviors if the Cult's hold on the Nikto was broken. It was believed that she admired the Cult for its ability to galvanize the Nikto people, even as she sought to destroy it and bring the Nikto into the [[Hutt Empire]]. She ordered that the Cult's main headquarters be [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombarded]] from [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], killing off many of their leaders and leaving the Nikto people without a strong leadership. The Nikto then signed their support over to her and to the Hutts.
